name: voltlist
description: VoltList — complete EV/PHEV/HEV catalog, filter, favorite, compare & export (MY2024–2026).

scripts.typecheck: npm -w shared run typecheck && npm -w server run typecheck && npm -w web run typecheck
scripts.build: npm -w server run build && npm -w web run build
scripts.test: npm -w shared run test && npm -w server run test && npm -w web run test
scripts.dev: npm -w server run dev & npm -w web run dev
